Our Roster

The Artists

Meet the talent MusiQave is proud to represent and promote — artists building their sound and their legacy.

Roster

Featured Artists

Afropop · Hip-Hop

BhadGurl JGO

BhadGurl JGO is a multidimensional artist blending Afropop, hip-hop, and R&B into a sound that's fearless and fresh. Her debut single "By Your Side" announced her arrival with a statement — bold visuals, a commanding presence, and a hook that doesn't let go.

Latest Release

By Your Side

Work with us

Afropop · Dance

Chemmie

Chemmie is an explosive performer with an energy that lights up every room she enters. Her music is a vibrant blend of Afropop and high-octane dancehall vibes — playful, bold, and unapologetically herself. "Rolling Dollar" introduced her to fans across the continent.

Latest Release

Rolling Dollar

Work with us

Afrobeats · Soul

Mishl

Mishl is a soulful storyteller with an ear for the extraordinary. His blend of Afrobeats and soul creates music that feels deeply personal yet universally relatable. "Opportunity" showcased his songwriting depth and cemented him as an artist worth watching closely.

Latest Release

Opportunity

Work with us

Afrobeats · R&B

CigaBoi

CigaBoi is a rising force in the Afrobeats and R&B scene, known for his raw authenticity and magnetic stage presence. With a sound that blends soulful melodies and street narratives, he's carving out a distinct lane in the Nigerian music landscape.

Latest Release

JAH
